children.heading: Contract compliance and performance
children.label: a Contract compliance and performance
children.text: The Secretary, through the Service, shall develop procedures to evaluate compliance with grant requirements under this subchapter and compliance with, and performance of contracts entered into by urban Indian organizations under this subchapter. Such procedures shall include provisions for carrying out the requirements of this section.

children.heading: Annual onsite evaluation
children.label: b Annual onsite evaluation
children.text: The Secretary, through the Service, shall conduct an annual onsite evaluation of each urban Indian organization which has entered into a contract or received a grant under for purposes of determining the compliance of such organization with, and evaluating the performance of such organization under, such contract or the terms of such grant.section 1653 of this title

children.heading: Noncompliance or unsatisfactory performance
children.label: c Noncompliance or unsatisfactory performance
children.text: If, as a result of the evaluations conducted under this section, the Secretary determines that an urban Indian organization has not complied with the requirements of a grant or complied with or satisfactorily performed a contract under , the Secretary shall, prior to renewing such contract or grant, attempt to resolve with such organization the areas of noncompliance or unsatisfactory performance and modify such contract or grant to prevent future occurrences of such noncompliance or unsatisfactory performance. If the Secretary determines that such noncompliance or unsatisfactory performance cannot be resolved and prevented in the future, the Secretary shall not renew such contract or grant with such organization and is authorized to enter into a contract or make a grant under with another urban Indian organization which is situated in the same urban center as the urban Indian organization whose contract or grant is not renewed under this section.section 1653 of this titlesection 1653 of this title

children.heading: Contract and grant renewals
children.label: d Contract and grant renewals
children.text: In determining whether to renew a contract or grant with an urban Indian organization under which has completed performance of a contract or grant under , the Secretary shall review the records of the urban Indian organization, the reports submitted under , and, in the case of a renewal of a contract or grant under , shall consider the results of the onsite evaluations conducted under subsection (b).section 1653 of this titlesection 1654 of this titlesection 1657 of this titlesection 1653 of this title
